description: ToolComp-style prompts for evaluating ci-wiki agent tool composition

test_cases.name: Single Tool: Write Company Page
test_cases.description: Agent should write a company page with correct tool call
test_cases.scenario: You have gathered information about OpenAI from their website. Write a new wiki page for the company with name 'OpenAI', type 'company', founded 2015, hq 'San Francisco', and content about their founding and products.

test_cases.name: Tool Composition: Search and Write
test_cases.description: Agent should search for existing page before deciding to write
test_cases.scenario: You want to create a page about Claude. First, check if a page already exists for Claude by searching. If it doesn't exist, create a new product page.

test_cases.name: Tool Composition: Read and Update
test_cases.description: Agent should read existing page before updating
test_cases.scenario: Update the OpenAI company page with new information about their latest product releases. First read the existing page to understand current content.

test_cases.name: Abstain: No Relevant Data
test_cases.description: Agent should abstain from writing when search returns empty
test_cases.scenario: You're asked to create a page about 'FakeCompanyXYZ123'. Search the wiki for any existing information about this company. Only create a page if you find relevant information.
test_cases.note: Should NOT write since search returns nothing

test_cases.name: Complex Chain: Search, Read, Update with Cross-refs
test_cases.description: Multi-step tool composition with cross-reference checking
test_cases.scenario: You found that Google DeepMind has a new research partnership with OpenAI. Update the Google DeepMind page to link to OpenAI and verify both pages have correct cross-references.

test_cases.name: Edge Case: Detect Duplicate Entry
test_cases.description: Agent should search for duplicates before writing new page
test_cases.scenario: Create a page for 'Generative AI' trend. Search first to ensure no similar trend pages exist (check for 'AI', 'generative', 'generative-ai').
test_cases.note: Should find existing 'generative-ai-rise' trend and not create duplicate

test_cases.name: Parameter Correctness: Page Path Format
test_cases.scenario: Create a page for the person 'Sam Altman, CEO of OpenAI'. The page path should follow format 'people/sam-altman'.

test_cases.name: Parameter Correctness: Required YAML Fields
test_cases.description: Verify required YAML frontmatter fields are present
test_cases.scenario: Create a new product page for 'GPT-4'. It must include name, type, company, category, and last_updated fields.

test_cases.name: Parameter Correctness: Cross-reference Syntax
test_cases.scenario: Create a page for Anthropic that mentions Claude. Use proper wiki cross-reference syntax: [[product:claude]].

test_cases.name: Parameter Correctness: Confidence Score in Comments
test_cases.description: Verify confidence is properly placed in HTML comments (not frontmatter) with format: <!-- confidence: high|medium|low -->
test_cases.scenario: Create a page with pricing information. Add confidence comment to indicate data reliability.
test_cases.note: Confidence goes in content comments, not frontmatter

test_cases.name: Error Handling: Invalid Entity Type
test_cases.description: Agent should catch invalid entity types
test_cases.scenario: Create a page with type 'invalid_type'. Valid types are: company, product, person, trend.
test_cases.note: Should abstain due to invalid type

test_cases.name: Conditional Logic: Update vs Create
test_cases.description: Decide whether to update existing page or create new
test_cases.scenario: You have new information about ChatGPT. Check if a ChatGPT page exists. If it exists, update it with new info. If not, create it.
test_cases.conditional: if search_result.found then write else skip

tool_invocation_accuracy.description: Did the agent call the correct tools in the right order?
tool_invocation_accuracy.scoring: 1 point per correct tool call, 0 if wrong tool or missing

parameter_correctness.description: Are tool parameters in correct format and values?
parameter_correctness.scoring: 1 point per correct parameter, 0.5 for partial matches

abstention_accuracy.description: Did the agent correctly decide to abstain when needed?
abstention_accuracy.scoring: 1 point if correct abstention decision, -1 if wrong

sequencing.description: Are tools called in the correct logical order?
sequencing.scoring: 1 point if sequence is optimal, 0.5 if valid but suboptimal
